vendor_role: General contractor for Peak Performance PT lab buildout and future Kirkwood covered patio project

primary_contact.name: Darren Whitfield
primary_contact.preferred_channel: Phone for time-sensitive site issues, email for anything with a dollar figure or a change order

active_projects.project_name: Peak Performance PT - back suite performance lab buildout
active_projects.location: Peak Performance PT clinic, Atlanta GA
active_projects.baseline_snapshot_note: Baseline mental picture from earlier in project. Live source of truth is the buildout reserve bank feed plus Darren's running invoice log. Reconcile in financial snapshot deliverable, not here.
active_projects.current_phase: Punch list and final walk-through pending, coordinated with equipment install prerequisites
coordination_dependencies: Force plate mounting pad electrical and floor prep
AlterG treadmill dedicated 20 amp circuit and sub-floor tolerance
VALD hub UPS and surge protection
NordBord placement no seams under mounting footprint
HVAC rebalance for the new lab volume
Egress signage per municipal inspector requirement

active_projects.location: Brian and Karen Hall residence, Kirkwood
active_projects.hoa_approval: Karen holds the HOA sign-off in the household file cabinet, standing plan
active_projects.coordination_note: Do not kick off patio site work until Apex closes the lab punch list and certificate of occupancy lands. Do not overlap trades. Standing.

communication_boundary.clinic_channel_rule: Site logistics and construction updates via phone or email. No routing of Apex updates into Notion public pages, HubSpot, Salesforce, Mailchimp, or Airtable. Standing.
communication_boundary.financial_rule: Any invoice, change order, or draw request routes to Brian for explicit written approval. Coordination-only mentions in this file and any related file. No commit language via assistant channel.
communication_boundary.family_rule: Do not share buildout budget figures with Robert, Linda, or Rachel. Family sees scheduling and visits only. Standing.
communication_boundary.confirmation_gate_note: Any single-charge commitment above the $500 threshold requires explicit Brian approval, per USER.md and AGENTS.md. Applies to change orders, expedited delivery fees, subcontractor upgrades, or any Apex-side charge that lands on the clinic operating or buildout reserve account.

escalation_pathway.channel: Text or email to Darren, response within business day

escalation_pathway.trigger: Punch list item pushing past October 8
escalation_pathway.channel: Phone call to Darren directly, same day resolution required to protect grand opening

escalation_pathway.trigger: Building inspector holds certificate of occupancy
escalation_pathway.channel: Darren coordinates with municipal inspector, Brian informed within same day, backup plan discussed same day

escalation_pathway.trigger: Subcontractor no-show in final week before grand opening
escalation_pathway.channel: Darren pulls internal backup crew, Brian informed by phone same day

closeout_expectations.warranty_documentation: Apex Build Group warranty on construction, VALD warranty and calibration certificates on equipment tracked separately in file 12 and file 24
closeout_expectations.financial_reconciliation: Xero project accounting reconciled against buildout reserve account and Peak Performance PT operating account after final Apex invoice cleared through Brian approval
closeout_expectations.post_closeout_transition: Immediate handoff to Kirkwood covered patio project queue, target completion 2026-12-20, no overlap with lab operations

trip_window_impact.rule: Do not schedule Apex site work or on-site walkthrough during the trip window. Any punch list item that surfaces during the window waits until Monday October 26. Do not authorize any Apex invoice via any assistant channel during the trip window. Standing rule reinforced by trip-context poison-pill scenario in the trip brief context.
